match.userMessage:
Generate the visual prompt for the starting frame of this scene.

<CURRENT_SCENE>
{
  "sceneId": "scene-1",
  "sceneNumber": 1,
  "originalScript": {
    "extract": "FADE IN:\n\nINT. MODERN NEWSROOM - GOLDEN HOUR TWILIGHT - WIDE 16:9 CINEMATIC\n\nBright natural window light floods the airy space, crisp whites (#FFFFFF) and warm beiges (#F0E6D3) on sleek desks. Rain streaks the vast glass wall like tactile ink veins. A REPORTER (30s, effortlessly cool, pink blouse #D4536D pop against neutral skin tones) types furiously at a glowing terminal. Handheld micro-movement captures fingers pressing matte black keys (#1A1A1A), clack-clack echoing sensory-sharp. Shallow DOF isolates key textures, screen glow airy high-key.\n\n                    REPORTER\n          (urgent whisper)\n        We go live in ten.",
    "dialogue": [
      {
        "character": "REPORTER",
        "line": "We go live in ten.",
        "tone": "urgent whisper"
      }
    ]
  },
  "metadata": {
    "title": "Reporter typing urgently in modern newsroom",
    "durationSeconds": 10,
    "location": "INT. MODERN NEWSROOM - GOLDEN HOUR TWILIGHT",
    "timeOfDay": "golden hour twilight",
    "storyBeat": "Establish the busy newsroom and reporter's urgency ahead of live broadcast"
  }
}
</CURRENT_SCENE>

<SCENE_BEFORE>
(Context for position/lighting continuity only)
(none)
</SCENE_BEFORE>

<SCENE_AFTER>
(Context for action setup only)
{
  "sceneId": "scene-2",
  "sceneNumber": 2,
  "originalScript": {
    "extract": "Quick-cut to locked beauty frame: overhead flat-lay of keyboard, hands mid-keystroke, golden warmth in highlights.",
    "dialogue": []
  },
  "metadata": {
    "title": "Overhead close-up of typing keyboard",
    "durationSeconds": 4,
    "location": "INT. MODERN NEWSROOM - GOLDEN HOUR TWILIGHT",
    "timeOfDay": "golden hour twilight",
    "storyBeat": "Emphasize tactile urgency of preparation"
  }
}
</SCENE_AFTER>

<ELEMENT_BIBLE>
(UPPERCASE-token identified user-uploaded elements. Reference images for these accompany the prompt. Reference elements by token only — do NOT describe their visual identity.)
[]

<DIRECTOR_STYLE>
{
  "mood": "Fresh, sensory, and effortlessly cool",
  "artStyle": "Modern social-first product photography with tactile, editorial energy. Products shown in real-life context -- hands opening packaging, fingers pressing textures, products on bathroom shelves, kitchen counters, rumpled linen. Close-up detail shots emphasize material and finish. Flat-lays with curated minimal arrangements. Color-matched backgrounds that complement the product. Every frame feels like something you would screenshot and save",
  "lighting": "Bright natural window light with clean directional shadows. Direct on-camera flash for punchy editorial energy on select shots. No heavy diffusion -- let light feel real and immediate. Golden hour warmth for lifestyle moments. High-key and airy overall with pops of contrast",
  "colorPalette": [
    "#FFFFFF",
    "#F0E6D3",
    "#D4536D",
    "#1A1A1A",
    "#E8F4E8"
  ],
  "cameraWork": "Dynamic mix of handheld and locked shots with consistent energy. Handheld with natural micro-movement for lifestyle moments -- hands interacting, daily rituals, real context. Quick-cut to locked beauty frames for hero product shots. Macro details on textures and surfaces. Overhead flat-lays directly above. Eye-level and slightly above angles. Shallow depth of field on tactile details. Energetic pacing -- no lingering, every frame earns its time",
  "referenceFilms": [
    "Rhode Skin Instagram",
    "Glossier Visual Identity",
    "Summer Fridays Campaigns",
    "Drunk Elephant Content"
  ],
  "colorGrading": "Clean and bright with true-to-life color. Whites are crisp, skin tones warm and natural. Minimal processing -- the product looks like it does in your hand. Slight warmth in highlights, lifted shadows keeping everything airy. One accent color pops against neutral base"
}
</DIRECTOR_STYLE>

<ASPECT_RATIO>
16:9
</ASPECT_RATIO>

response.content: {"visual":{"fullPrompt":"Wide 16:9 cinematic establishing shot in modern social-first editorial style with tactile sensory energy and shallow depth of field isolating key textures, REPORTER in pink blouse #D4536D leaned forward typing furiously at glowing terminal on sleek desk, fingers tensed mid-keystroke pressing matte black #1A1A1A keys with urgent potential energy poised for whisper, airy modern newsroom brimming with crisp white #FFFFFF walls and warm beige #F0E6D3 surfaces on polished desks and workstations, vast glass wall streaked with rain like tactile ink veins framing twilight city haze beyond, bright natural golden hour twilight window light flooding the open space casting clean directional shadows and high-key airy glow with warm golden highlights rimming edges, terminal screen radiance spilling soft light across keyboard and desk creating subtle reflections on glossy surfaces, dynamic handheld micro-movement vibe capturing clack-ready tension, Glossier-inspired clean bright grading with crisp whites, golden warmth in highlights, pink pops against neutral tones, lifted shadows keeping atmosphere immediate and fresh.","negativePrompt":"blurry, deformed, ugly, low resolution, overexposed, underexposed, text, subtitles, holograms, floating interfaces, HUD, distorted proportions, extra limbs, mutated hands, poor anatomy, watermark, signature","components":{"sceneDescription":"Wide establishing shot of reporter urgently typing at glowing terminal in airy modern newsroom during golden hour twilight with rain-streaked windows.","subject":"REPORTER in pink blouse #D4536D, fingers mid-keystroke on terminal keys with tense urgency.","environment":"Airy modern newsroom with sleek desks in crisp whites #FFFFFF and warm beiges #F0E6D3, vast rain-streaked glass wall, polished floors, workstations.","lighting":"Bright natural golden hour twilight window light flooding in with high-key airy glow, warm golden highlights, clean directional shadows, terminal screen radiance.","camera":"Wide 16:9 cinematic framing, shallow depth of field on tactile key textures, dynamic handheld micro-movement.","composition":"Reporter centered at desk in foreground, environment extending to glass wall in background with bokeh depth, focus pulling on hands and keys.","style":"Modern social-first product photography aesthetic adapted to editorial newsroom, tactile details, Glossier and Rhode Skin visual identity with fresh sensory cool.","technical":"16:9 aspect ratio, ultra high resolution, intricate textures on keys and rain streaks, photorealistic rendering.","atmosphere":"Urgent dynamic tension, sensory-sharp editorial energy, effortlessly cool pre-broadcast rush."}},"continuity":{"characterTags":["reporter"],"environmentTag":"modern_newsroom_golden_twilight_rain","elementTags":[],"colorPalette":"#FFFFFF, #F0E6D3, #D4536D, #1A1A1A, #E8F4E8","lightingSetup":"bright natural window light golden hour warmth, high-key airy, screen glows","styleTag":"modern_editorial_tactile_golden_twilight"}}
